zh.Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾拉普利
zh.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.lifeSummary: John Bourne是John Bourne的兒子，於1600年11月23日在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆受洗。他於1622年2月11日與Frances Hill在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾拉普利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1627年住在英國斯塔福爾。他去世於1633年1月17日在英國斯塔福爾拉普利享年32歲。

zh-hans.Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾拉普利
zh-hans.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Bourne是John Bourne的儿子，于1600年11月23日在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆受洗。他于1622年2月11日与Frances Hill在英国英格兰斯塔福爾拉普利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1627年住在英国斯塔福爾。他去世于1633年1月17日在英国斯塔福爾拉普利享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: John Bourne was christened on 23 November 1600, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England as the son of John Bourne. He married Frances Hill on 11 February 1622, in Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He lived in Staffordshire, England in 1627. He died on 17 January 1633, in Lapley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: John Bourne a été baptisé le 23 novembre 1600, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fils de John Bourne. Il a épousé Frances Hill le 11 février 1622, à Lapley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Staffordshire, Angleterre en 1627. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1633, à Lapley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Bourne wurde am 23. November 1600 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, als Sohn von John Bourne getauft. Er hat am 11. Februar 1622 in Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Frances Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1627 hat er in Staffordshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 17. Januar 1633 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Lapley, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: John Bourne è stato battezzato il 23 novembre 1600 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England come figlio di John Bourne. Lui sposato Frances Hill il 11 febbraio 1622, nel Lapley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Staffordshire, England nel 1627. Morì il 17 gennaio 1633, nel Lapley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United K: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリー
ja.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレム
ja.Lapley, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリー
ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John Bourneは1600年11月23日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでJohn Bourneの息子として洗礼を受けた。1622年2月11日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリーでFrances Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1627年にはイギリススタフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1633年1月17日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリーで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bourne(은)는 1600년 11월 23일 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 John Bourne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1622년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 라플리에서 Frances Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1627년도에 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그는 1633년 1월 17일 영국 스태퍼드실르 라플리에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 November 1600–17 January 1633: 23 de novembro de 1600–17 de janeiro de 1633
pt.lifeSummary: John Bourne foi batizado em 23 de novembro de 1600, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filho de John Bourne. Ele casou-se com Frances Hill em 11 de fevereiro de 1622, em Lapley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Staffordshire, Inglaterra em 1627. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1633, em Lapley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Bourne был крещен 23 ноября 1600 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия. Его отца звали John Bourne. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Hill 11 февраля 1622 г. в местности лапли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности стаффордшир, Англия в 1627 году. Он умер 17 января 1633 г. в местности лапли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.23 November 1600–17 January 1633: 23 de noviembre de 1600–17 de enero de 1633
es.lifeSummary: John Bourne se bautizó el 23 de noviembre de 1600, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John Bourne. Se casó con Frances Hill el 11 de febrero de 1622, en Lapley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Vivió en Staffordshire, Inglaterra en 1627. Murió el 17 de enero de 1633, en Lapley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años.
